case_title: JOHN B VLAHOS et al VS. CHRISTOPHER LUARKIE et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LUARKIE, CHRISTOPHER

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B VOZIKES, YOTA AS TO DEFENDANT LUARKIE, CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
